task1.title: The percentage of a car manufacturer’s total sales, per region, from 2002 to 2006
task1.instruction: The bar chart shows the percentage of a car manufacturer’s total sales, per region, from 2002 to 2006. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Some people believe that a lot of scientific research done today is a waste of time and money. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
